reasons: localized public Atlas route and native form semantics
Public Content Envelope Atlas dataset interface
server-owned query normalization, filtering, sorting and pagination
bilingual URL-state preservation and no-JavaScript discovery

reproducibility.detail: GitHub Actions completed the pinned default Release Gate from a clean checkout on Linux and Windows for implementation commit 71ad281; both jobs passed and uploaded immutable reports with recorded SHA-256 digests.

static_correctness.detail: Web lint, TypeScript typecheck, production build and release-gate ownership and trust checks pass locally and in Linux and Windows clean checkouts.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29552556299 Linux and Windows default gates: PASS

public_contracts.detail: The localized Atlas uses canonical URL state for q, status, sex, facility, completeness, sort and page; invalid, unsupported and repeated values are normalized by permanent redirect; browser history and locale switching preserve compatible task state.
evidence: local and Staging full browser suites: 35/35 PASS

media_and_content_truth.detail: Results are limited to reviewed pandas with trusted profile destinations, use only auditable relevance, name and birth sorting, distinguish complete and partial records and truthful media states, and preserve country-level location precision when no reviewed facility exists.
evidence: Mei Xiang remains labeled China country-level rather than an inferred facility
legacy popularity and featured presenters deleted

browser_journeys.detail: The complete 35-test production browser suite passes locally, in clean-checkout CI and against the immutable Staging deployment; it covers search-to-profile navigation, combined filters, deterministic sorting, pagination and history restore, invalid URL normalization, bilingual state preservation, keyboard submission, mobile layout and no-JavaScript results.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29552556299 Linux and Windows browser checks: PASS

automated_accessibility.detail: Desktop and 320-pixel mobile axe WCAG A/AA scans cover Chinese and English Atlas discovery, with native keyboard-operable form controls, no horizontal overflow and reduced-motion verification locally, in CI and against Staging.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29552556299 Linux and Windows automated core WCAG checks: PASS

visual_regression.detail: A named semantic visual review of the Slice 3 Staging deployment is not yet recorded.

performance_budgets.detail: The production and Cloudflare builds report 107 kB First Load JS for the localized Atlas, below the Slice 3 route budget of 170 KiB.

staging.detail: Implementation commit 71ad281 is bound to an immutable Cloudflare frontend Version ID and bundle checksum, and the complete browser and automated accessibility suites pass against the deployed Staging URL.
evidence: Staging browser suite 35/35 PASS; automated accessibility suite 18/18 PASS

human_signoff.detail: Named product-owner review of bilingual filters, result summaries, pagination, mobile reflow and URL sharing is not yet recorded for Slice 3.

release_decision.detail: Clean-checkout automation and immutable Staging verification are complete for implementation commit 71ad281, but named semantic visual and product-owner review remain incomplete. This manifest must not be interpreted as release GO.
